programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Two Doctors stranded in a forbidding snowscape, refusing to face regeneration, and a British army captain seemingly destined to die in the First World War, but taken from the trenches to play his part in the Doctor's story. This is the magical last chapter in the Twelfth Doctor's epic adventure. He must face his past to decide his future, and realise the resilience of humanity, discovering hope in his darkest frozen moment. It's the end of an era, but the Doctor's journey is only just beginning.

programme.desc: Discoveries include a four-leaf clover brooch which brings luck to its owner, as well as a collection of Radiohead memorabilia. A former Concorde pilot reminisces about the celebrity passengers he used to fly across the Atlantic.
